race.comment: DUNSTALL THE GUN (4) handy gelding on the quick back-up. Had genuine excuses from the wide gate with a plugging seventh over 1600m at Scone last Friday. Well drawn for this and should prove too good for these. MOONLIGHT DIVA (10) was rewarded for her consistency third-up with a strong Maiden win over 1405m at Coffs Harbour. Claim helps again in a fairly average contest. AFLOAT (1) resumes and is now in the Wayne Oakenfull stable. Struggled to see the trip out when eighth over 2000m at Hawkesbury in BM64 class. This is much easier and fitted with the one trial over 925m. Keep safe. BEEARETEE (2) holding his form and will appreciate the firmer surface after finishing a battling second over 1405m at Coffs Harbour in the heavy (10) going.
